title: spinacia oleracea subsp. spinosa
intro: Spinacia oleracea subsp. spinosa, also known as wild spinach or prickly spinach, is a subspecies of the spinach plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Spinacia oleracea subsp. spinosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support eye health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
